name: EuiBadgeGroup
description: Wrapping container for a group of EuiBadge items.
visualDescription: A flex-wrapping container for multiple EuiBadge pill elements. Visually appears as a row or multi-row cluster of pill-shaped chips with uniform gaps between them. Has no border or background of its own — the individual badges inside it supply the color and shape. NOT a single badge (always contains two or more).

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

children.description: Should be a list of `EuiBadge`s, but can also be any other element
